prompt_text: A hellish horde of Dobermans with glowing red eyes leaps from the flames in Felis Infernum. The infernal gates slam behind you. There's no escape—only battle.

pass.message: You conquered the fire-born Dobermans and emerge singed but victorious. You gain +1 Max Health and continue deeper into the abyss.

fail.message: You were torn apart by the infernal fangs of the Doberman legion. Felis Infernum claims another soul.
